# This file is generated by the publisher script in the private AwowLab
# repo. Edits made here are overwritten on the next sync; development
# happens in the private repo (see the Contributing section of README.md).

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
project(UIManager LANGUAGES CXX)

# ImGui library with the GLFW and Vulkan backends. The sources are fetched
# by the root CMakeLists; imgui_SOURCE_DIR is set there.
add_library(imgui STATIC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_draw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_tables.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/imgui_widgets.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp
)

target_include_directories(imgui PUBLIC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/backends
)

target_link_libraries(imgui PUBLIC glfw Vulkan::Vulkan)

# Meter/overlay UI core - the subset of the full AwowLab UI the live
# overlay needs.
add_library(UIMeterCore STATIC
    src/Color/ActorColorGenerator.cpp
    src/Core/MeterBarRenderer.cpp
    src/UI/AwlUI/Theme.cpp
    src/UI/AwlUI/Widgets.cpp
    src/UI/Overlay/OverlayWindow.cpp
    src/UI/Overlay/UIOverlayControls.cpp
    src/UI/Overlay/UIStalenessIndicator.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/BreakdownGraphRenderer.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/BreakdownSpellTableRenderer.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/MeterViewBase.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIActorBreakdownPanel.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIAvoidanceBreakdownPanel.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIDeathRecapPanel.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIMeterPanel.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIMeterPanel_Breakdowns.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Combat/UIMeterPanel_Views.cpp
    src/UI/Panels/Settings/UIMobWeightPanel.cpp
    src/UI/SpellContextMenu.cpp
    src/UI/SpellGroupSettings.cpp
    src/UI/SpellLinkOpener.cpp
)

target_include_directories(UIMeterCore
    PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
)

target_link_libraries(UIMeterCore
    PUBLIC
        glfw
        Vulkan::Vulkan
        imgui
        Parser
        Database
)

target_precompile_headers(UIMeterCore PRIVATE
    "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../pch.h>"
)

set_target_properties(UIMeterCore PROPERTIES
    UNITY_BUILD ON
    UNITY_BUILD_BATCH_SIZE 16
)
